stemHtml: Which definition of propeller parameters is correct?

options.a: Helix angle is the angle between the actual path of the propeller and the propeller axis.
options.b: Geometric pitch is the actual distance a propeller would advance in one revolution.
options.c: Propeller angle of attack is the angle between the blade chord line and the relative airflow.
options.d: Blade angle is the angle between the blade chord line and the propeller axis.
